title: Immunization resources for health professionals: Printable awareness products - Canada.ca
content:
## Immunization resources for health professionals: Printable awareness products
Distinguishing features of anaphylaxis
Visual aid for the diagnosis and management of anaphylaxis in a community setting
Dosage of intramuscular EPINEPHrine 1:1000 (1 mg/mL) solution by age or weight
Epinephrine dosage table for the management of anaphylaxis following immunization in a community setting
